product.description:
Key features:
WhatHiFi 5-Star bookshelf speakers Exceptional value for money with advanced features for the price point Curved braced cabinets help to eliminate vibrations and dissipate standing waves Gold-plated bi-wire connection separates high and low frequencies for enhanced clarity Dual reflex ports enhance overall bass response and clarity
5-year warranty & 30-day money-back guarantee included
Overview: The Wharfedale Diamond 9.1 Bookshelf Speakers are clear and precise with unmatched sound reproduction at their level. They boast curved braced cabinets that not only allude to the premium aesthetic qualities of higher-priced speakers but also help to reduce unwanted cabinet vibrations and dissipate derogatory standing waves that can negatively affect your sound. The five-inch Kevlar mid/bass driver and one-inch textile tweeter work effortlessly together offering sparkling highs and full controlled lows revealing details in your favourite tracks that may have previously gone unheard. The gold-plated bi-wireable binding posts a trait usually only found at higher price ranges ensure complete versatility in your set-up and will benefit those who aim to achieve a precise and clean sound where high and low frequencies blend harmoniously without a fight for air space.

product.product_name: Cello C50WS4K 50" inch Smart WiFi WebOS 4K Ultra HD TV Freeview Play FRAMELESS
product.description:
50‚Ä≥ Smart WebOS 4K Ultra HD TV with Freeview Play and Frameless Bezel
50‚ÄĚ 4K Ultra HD LED TV LG‚Äôs Smart operating system, WebOS Hub built-in Download apps through the web browser Freeview HD by Aerial & also a Satellite tuner built-in with Freesat Bluetooth connectivity (easily add a Bluetooth soundbar) Freeview Play with 100 channels and 20,000 hours of free on-demand content 3 x HDMI inputs for your external devices and consoles Can be wall mounted (200mm x 100mm bracket & 4 pcs M5 X8 not included)
The built-in Smart platform, developed by LG, allows you to browse the web and download all your favourite entertainment apps, so you can stream directly to the TV. From Netflix, Prime Video and Disney Plus to YouTube and catch-up apps like BBC iPlayer and ITVx, a world of entertainment awaits.
With Freeview Play you can watch an impressive 60,000+ hours of TV and over 1,500 boxsets, across your favourite on-demand players. All for free.
With the built-in Bluetooth connectivity, you can add a Bluetooth soundbar to the TV. This means cinema sound can be enjoyed without the need for untidy cables. The built-in satellite tuner with Freesat provides access to over 170 channels with 100% channel coverage on a subscription-free basis. Plus, you‚Äôll find your favourite on-demand players all in one place. You will just need to purchase and install your own satellite dish/cabling. The ultimate flat-screen TV with its super-slim bezel and lightweight design is ideal for wall mounting and easy maneuverability
Specification Screen Size 50‚Ä≥ Freeview Play Yes DVD Player No USB Yes ‚Äď playback only Contrast Ratio 5000:1 Brightness 250 Max Resolution 3840 x 2160 Speakers 2 x 8W Smart Yes Max Power 120W Energy Rating ‚ÄėG ‚Äď 71 watts on working and 0.5 watt standby power consumption HDMI 3 Inputs RF Antenna, HDMI X3, CVBS, USB x 2, RJ45 Outputs Digital Audio Out, Earphone Out VESA 200mm x 100mm Dimension w/stand W 1110 x H 733 x D 268 mm Dimensions w/o stand W 1110 x H 644 x D 34 mm Weight 9.1kg

product.product_name: Coffee Machine Espresso Machine Coffee Maker Cappuccino Milk Frother 20 Bar 1.8L
product.description: ‚úÖ 20Bar High-Pressure Extraction Equipped with a professional high-pressure water pump, it delivers a stable 20Bar extraction pressure to instantly penetrate coffee grounds, fully releasing the aroma and oils of coffee beans. It easily restoring the rich flavor of authentic espresso‚ÄĒevery sip rivals the quality of specialty caf√© drinks. ‚úÖ 1.8L Large-Capacity Removable Water Tank No need for frequent refills; a full tank can make multiple cups for the whole family, easily handling daily use and small gatherings. The semi-transparent design lets you check water levels at a glance, and the detachable structure, paired with a separate drip tray, makes refilling and cleaning a breeze‚ÄĒsaving time and effort. ‚úÖ Food-Grade Stainless Steel Manufacturing The body and core contact parts are made of food-grade stainless steel, which is corrosion-resistant, high-temperature resistant, and durable. It eliminates residual odors, ensuring every cup of coffee is pure and safe, balancing premium texture with practicality. ūüõ†ÔłŹ All-Inclusive Accessories ¬∑ Unlock Diverse Coffee Experiences The machine comes with a complete set of professional accessories, so you can start your home barista journey right out of the box. It balances professionalism and convenience to suit ‚ėē Scenario Adaptation ¬∑ Perfect for Your Daily Moments ūüĆÖ Morning Wake-Up: One-tap espresso, paired with milk for an energizing latte to chase away drowsiness and kickstart a productive day. ‚ėē Afternoon Relaxation: Brew a cup of freshly ground coffee with dessert, enjoying a moment of peaceful solitude and elevating your at-home ritual. ūü•ā Friend Gatherings: Quick double-cup brewing and a variety of milk-based drinks let you host a cozy coffee party at home. ūüíľ Office Energy Boost: Fast capsule brewing eliminates waiting time, providing timely energy to enhance work efficiency. ūüďĆ Product Specifications Extraction Pressure: 20Bar high-pressure extraction Water Tank Capacity: 1.8L large-capacity removable water tank

product.product_name: 11.5" Portable DVD Player with 9.5" Large HD Swivel Screen High Volume Speaker
product.description:
About this item ūüĎ®‚ÄćūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎß„ÄźPortable and Magical„ÄĎ-- Compact design makes it easy to carry out with you. Take it on your road trip and get double surprises both on and off the screen. portable DVD player can be easily swiveled as a tablet and mounted to the car headrest, brings tons of fun for your journey. ūüĎ®‚ÄćūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎß„Äź5 Hrs Battery Life„ÄĎ-- Upgraded battery capacity to 2500mAh, you and your family can watch 1-2 movies without any worries. Our portable DVD player for car provide a certificated AC power adapter and car charger in the package, no more worries about the battery dying out when you are out. ūüĎ®‚ÄćūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎß„ÄźProtective and Gorgeous Screen„ÄĎ-- portable DVD player for kids adopts the HD Eye-protective Screen, and refuses the recycled screen, aiming at alleviating eye fatigue caused by the long use, more comfortable and protective screen for your kids‚Äô eyes. ūüĎ®‚ÄćūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎß„ÄźAll Regions & Multi Formats„ÄĎ-- Supports CD,DVD,VCD,SVCD,CD¬ĪR/¬ĪRW,DVD¬ĪR/¬ĪRW from all region (Blu-ray and pirated discs are not supported); DVD player portable also support multi-media files via USB and SD Card (16-32GB), such as VOB, AVI, MPEG, MP3, WMA, JPEG. ūüĎ®‚ÄćūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎß„ÄźDual Speakers & Clear Sound„ÄĎ-- Portable dvd player with screen equipped with two high-power speakers, which makes the volume louder. There is a 3.5mm earphone jack on the right side of the portable dvd players so that you can get a concentrated and clearer sound for your private viewing. ūüĎ®‚ÄćūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎß„ÄźEasy Operation & Seamless Viewing„ÄĎ-- DVD player has a simple operating system and a convenient remote control, making it an ideal companion for the kids and elderly. Never miss out on exciting plots, the Break-point memory function can ensure seamless connection of the plot. ūüĎ®‚ÄćūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎß„ÄźPremium Service & Quick Response„ÄĎ-- We are committed to providing the best after-sales service to our customers. If you have any questions, concerns, or issues with the your device, we are here to help you 24 hours a day.
‚ėÖEye-protection LCD screen‚ėÖ: DVD player provide a 800*480 Swivel Screen with 270 degrees rotation and 180 degrees flip. The portable player can be swiveled as a tablet to attache to the car backseat to play. ‚ėÖSuper High Battery‚ėÖ: Upgrade battery capacity to 2 times as the original ones, ensures the 5 hours play time. Not enough? Free car charger provided in the package. ‚ėÖResume Play‚ėÖ: Support break-point memory function, make it possible to start from where you left at last time, no need to start again. ‚ėÖGame Player‚ėÖ: This DVD player is more than a DVD player, we provide a free game controller in our package, kids also can use this to play 180 kinds of retro games, such as super Mario etc. Note: customer need do download game cd by yourself. ‚ėÖMulti-Media‚ėÖ: Directly play in formats: CD, DVD, CD-R/RW, DVD-R/+R, DVD+RW/-RW, VCD, SVCD; USB and SD Card supported: MP3/WMA/WAV, JPEG, MPEG2/AVI, TXT.
The new version of portable DVD player. 3 years in portable DVD player make us understand your needs better and make prodcuts more better.
Your Home Cinema always with You: Our Portable DVD Player has a built-in USB port that allows you to enjoy your favorite movies while travelling, camping, sightseeing,you can also copy your CD files to USB or SD card. Improved battery: Improved 2000mAh Lithium battery extend the play time to 5 hours,even the adapter was left at home,do not need to worry about losing battery power whilst watching a movie.
Break Point memory: Break Point memory function make it possible to start from where you end at last time. Sync to your TV Screen: With the included AV cable, it's available to transmit the screen from DVD player to your TV to enjoy a bigger and clearer screen. Fantastic Swivel Screen: portable DVD player with 9.5 inch 270¬į rotation and 180¬į flip screen make it possible to attach to the car headrest and make you enjoy your time when you are on boring road trip.
Package Including: 1x Portable DVD player 1x AV cable 1x Remote controller 1x Power adapter 1x Car charger 1x User manual

product.product_name: 2 Packs 6AH For Makita 18V Battery Li-Ion BL1830 BL1850 BL1840 BL1860B LXT400
Bluetooth FM Transmitter Car Kit MP3 Player USB Charger Handsfree Adapter UK
product.description:
Upgrade your driving experience with this multifunctional Car Charger Bluetooth adapter. Combining hands-free calling, music streaming, and rapid charging, it‚Äôs the perfect companion for every journey. Designed with Fast Charger BT 5.0 technology, it delivers high-speed charging while keeping your devices connected safely.
‚≠ź Key Features Bluetooth 5.0 Connectivity: Stable, fast pairing with smartphones for calls, music, and navigation audio. FM Transmitter Function: Stream your favorite playlists directly to your car stereo via FM radio. Dual USB Fast Charging Ports: Supports rapid charging for multiple devices simultaneously. MP3 Player Support: Play music from USB drives or SD cards effortlessly. Hands-Free Calling: Clear audio with built-in microphone ensures safe driving. Compact & Universal Design: Fits all standard car cigarette lighter sockets and works with most vehicles.
ūüďä Technical Specs Bluetooth Version: 5.0 Input: DC 12-24V Output: 5V/2.4A per USB port Frequency Range: 87.5‚Äď108MHz Compatible Formats: MP3/WMA/WAV LED Display: Shows FM frequency and device info
ūüí° Benefits Charge your phone and other devices quickly with Fast Charger BT 5.0 technology. Enjoy seamless music streaming without tangled wires. Stay safe with hands-free calling while driving. Compact design keeps your dashboard neat and organized.
ūüéĮ Ideal For Daily commuters who need fast device charging and music on the go. Road trips and long drives requiring hands-free calls and entertainment. Anyone who wants to upgrade an older car stereo to Bluetooth functionality. Drivers with multiple devices needing simultaneous fast charging.
ūüĆź Vast Applications Cars, SUVs, trucks, and other vehicles with cigarette lighter sockets. Listening to music or podcasts from smartphones, USB drives, or SD cards. Hands-free calls during work commutes, rideshare driving, or family trips. Charging smartphones, tablets, GPS devices, power banks, and other USB devices. Enhancing older car stereos with FM broadcasting and Bluetooth connectivity.

Be fully prepared for unexpected emergencies with this high‚ÄĎquality EMERGENCY HAMMER featuring a WINDOW BREAKER & SEATBELT CUTTER. Designed for rapid response, this compact yet durable tool can make a critical difference when seconds matter.
‚≠ź Key Features ‚úĒ 2-in-1 Emergency Design ‚Äď Heavy-duty window breaker & seatbelt cutter in one compact tool ‚úĒ Hardened Steel Hammer Head ‚Äď Instantly shatters side windows in emergency situations ‚úĒ Sharp Concealed Blade ‚Äď Quickly cuts jammed or locked seatbelts ‚úĒ Non-Slip Anti-Skid Handle ‚Äď Firm grip for safe and controlled use ‚úĒ High-Visibility Red Body ‚Äď Easy to locate in stressful situations ‚úĒ Protective Mounting Bracket ‚Äď Secure and convenient storage within reach ‚úĒ Compact & Lightweight ‚Äď Fits glove box, door pocket, or centre console
ūüĒß Technical Specifications Material: High-carbon hardened steel hammer head Handle: Durable ABS with anti-slip grip Blade: Stainless steel concealed safety blade Length: Approx. 17cm Weight: Approx. 130‚Äď150g Colour: Red Condition: Brand New Stock Location: UK
ūüĆć Vast Application of Usage This EMERGENCY HAMMER is suitable for a wide range of vehicles and emergency situations:
ūüöó Private cars & family vehicles ūüöē Taxis, Uber & ride-share vehicles ūüöö Vans, trucks & delivery fleets ūüöĆ Buses & minibuses ūüöź Motorhomes & caravans ūüöď Emergency & service vehicles ūüö§ Boats & marine vehicles ūüŹĘ Workplace fleet vehicles ūüéí Travel safety kits & roadside emergency kits Perfect for emergencies involving:
Vehicle submersion in water Electrical or central locking failure Car fires Severe collisions Jammed doors after impact
ūüõ° Key Benefits ‚úĒ Enables fast escape when doors cannot be opened ‚úĒ Cuts seatbelts instantly to prevent entrapment ‚úĒ Provides peace of mind for drivers and passengers ‚úĒ A small investment for potentially life-saving protection
